creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Hi there,

A little while ago on the freebsd-office mailing list, we figured out
that LibreOffice will only work on i386 if you build it using GCC. The
port tries to use Clang, but this causes it to fail to start on i386.

For now, you can fix this by setting WITH_GCC in /etc/make.conf.

Tell me if this works.

Thanks,
Kevin Zheng
